reviews.comment:
Parada obligada camino al sur. Lugar con una atención muy buena en la playa de surtidores. Se venden bebidas Frías y calientes, también agua para el mate.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the way south. A place with excellent service on the beach with fountains. They sell hot and cold drinks, including water for mate.

reviews.comment:
Con respecto a la estación de servicio la atención es muy buena, destacó la limpieza de los baños, pero ..... Los precios son muy altos si uno desea comprar gaseosas o cualquier producto del salón del multiventa,

(Translated by Google)
Regarding the gas station, the service is very good, the cleanliness of the restrooms was particularly noteworthy, but... the prices are very high if you want to buy soft drinks or any product from the convenience store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBd28tcm9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar extremadamente concurrido, con largas filas a toda hora para cargar combustible y con un sector de alimentos y bebidas llamativamente básico. Ni un plato caliente ofrecen. Y todo MUY CARO.

(Translated by Google)
An extremely crowded place, with long lines at all hours to fill up with gas, and a remarkably basic food and beverage service. They don't even offer a single hot meal. And everything is VERY EXPENSIVE.
